title: Tracking
description: [gold]Weak[/gold] enemies take [blue]2[/blue] times more damage from Attacks.
smart_description: [gold]Weak[/gold] enemies take [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times more damage from Attacks.
notes: Applies a damage multiplier only when the owner or their pets deal Attack damage to a Weak target. The multiplier value (typically 2) is stored as the power's stack counter.
